rationale: The pair is not an obvious incidental mention: both papers are in new product/product-line design, and the citing study’s marketing component uses Bayesian preference modeling in a power-tool context, while the cited paper contributes a hierarchical Bayesian product-design model (also demonstrated in power tools). Given this strong methodological/domain overlap and plausible foundational/method-source role, it should be retained for full relation judgment despite lacking in-text citation context in the raw reference evidence.
